title: Serpentine Legendary Origin
description: Find a structure, and gain a one of a kind origin. Upgrade your abilities, and be careful of those who hunt for your new race.
body:
This datapack, add a new one of a kind structure to your game. To find it, open ancient city, stronghold, or woodland mansion chests. Then you may have a chance to find the one of a kind item. The Mysterious Compass. Once you have it, follow it to the structure. A mysterious ruins, that legends say holds the remains of the naga. Its said that it may curse you to be its next of kin. 

There is advancements to guide you the rest of the way thru the datapack.

This datapack is made to be run on a multiplayer server, where information about the origin, and its mechanics are limited. This datapack makes heavy use of block displays, and will not work in versions without them.


<details>
<summary>Admin Info</summary>

Admin commands are located here:
`/function naga:api/...`. Once you type in, it should show all the admin commands with autocorrect. 

Please note, the one of a kind structure, once opened, can not be resealed. The naga origin is designed to alwase be achivable to get, however its made to be passed from owner to owner. Where there is never more then one. As such, be careful using the `/origin set` command.

</details>
